title: MY (8 day late) POOPAVERSARY FIRST POOP RE-POOP EXTRAVAGANZA
description: Yes, 1 year ago I graced both Youtube and Youchew with my presence. It's nice to look back at all the time I could've used on something more productive. In celebration, I have taken my horrendous first Youtube poop viewed here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yDhCGRTJ3OI and made it better. Or worse. Or both. Probably both. When will I get bored with this? When will Youtube delete my account? When will I make something actually good? When will the infomercial on TV right now get interesting? All these answers and more will be in my 152nd video, 1:25 seconds in. Watch for that. Until then, you live in suspense. Ha ha ha. Ha. Ha. Now go away.
